cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 17236047) FILED BY PETITIONER PETERMAN, TERRENCE

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PETITIONER TERRENCE PETERMAN'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE PETITION IS GRANTED AS TO BOTH RESPONDENTS. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED AS TO BOTH RESPONDENTS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF TERRENCE PETERMAN IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AGAINST RESPONDENTS VISION AIRLINES, INC. AND WILLIAM ACOR CONFORMING TO THE RELIEF STATE IN THE ARBITRATION AWARD. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Tillman, Esq. (415-421-9292) for Petitioner/Moving party TERRENCE PETERMAN.
No other Appearance

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER TERRENCE PETERMAN's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted as to both respondents. Proof of service was filed as to both respondents. No opposition filed.
Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
